heading: Publication of notice; applications for membership on committees
label: 564 Publication of notice; applications for membership on committees
notes: Amendments1992— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–354section 584 of this title
amendments: Amendments1992— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–354section 584 of this title

children.text: an announcement that the agency intends to establish a negotiated rulemaking committee to negotiate and develop a proposed rule;
a description of the subject and scope of the rule to be developed, and the issues to be considered;
a list of the interests which are likely to be significantly affected by the rule;
a list of the persons proposed to represent such interests and the person or persons proposed to represent the agency;
a proposed agenda and schedule for completing the work of the committee, including a target date for publication by the agency of a proposed rule for notice and comment;
a description of administrative support for the committee to be provided by the agency, including technical assistance;
a solicitation for comments on the proposal to establish the committee, and the proposed membership of the negotiated rulemaking committee; and
an explanation of how a person may apply or nominate another person for membership on the committee, as provided under subsection (b).

children.heading: .—Applications for Membership orCommittee1So in original. Probably should be “on”.1
children.label: b .—Applications for Membership orCommittee1So in original. Probably should be “on”.1

children.text: the name of the applicant or nominee and a description of the interests such person shall represent;
evidence that the applicant or nominee is authorized to represent parties related to the interests the person proposes to represent;
a written commitment that the applicant or nominee shall actively participate in good faith in the development of the rule under consideration; and
the reasons that the persons specified in the notice under subsection (a)(4) do not adequately represent the interests of the person submitting the application or nomination.

children.heading: .—Period for Submission of Comments and Applications
children.label: c .—Period for Submission of Comments and Applications
children.text: The agency shall provide for a period of at least 30 calendar days for the submission of comments and applications under this section.
